args.query:
SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM review
GROUP BY gmap_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC
LIMIT 5000;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM review
GROUP BY gmap_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC
LIMIT 5000;
